results.title: DevRev : Apps designed for AI, no add-ons required | Product Hunt
results.content:
Jeffin Mathew

•1 review

DevRev is a game-changer for teams that want to bridge the gap between customer feedback and product development. Its AI-native platform provides a seamless way for support, product, and engineering teams to work together with real-time insights and collaboration. I love how it connects customers' requests directly to product roadmaps, making it easier to prioritize what truly matters to users. The Turing bots are a standout feature, helping with ticket deflection and self-service support saving time and resources. The focus on bringing the voice of the customer closer to engineering and product teams is unlike anything I’ve seen before. DevRev is not just a platform; it’s a way to build customer-centric products. Highly recommend giving it a try! [...] #### What's great

real-time collaboration (1)customer feedback integration (1)AI-native platform (2)product roadmap connection (1)Turing bots (1)ticket deflection (1)self-service support (1)

Developing DevRev utilizing its own capabilities has been a gratifying experience. DevRev transcends traditional product boundaries by not only addressing specific pain points but also delivering substantial value across customer satisfaction and growth, all powered by an intelligent AI platform.

4.7

Based on 6 reviews

Review HackerNoon? [...] Great App with Some Minor Issues I've been using this app for a while now, and overall, I really like it. It has a sleek design, and most of its functions work flawlessly. However, I've encountered a couple of issues on my specific phone that I hope can be addressed in future updates. Firstly, I've noticed that I can't exit the app using the Back button. It's a minor inconvenience, but it would be great if this could be fixed because it's a standard feature in most apps. Secondly, I've had trouble changing my Avatar within the app. It might be a compatibility issue with my device, but it's something that could enhance the user experience if resolved. Despite these small hiccups, I still find the app quite useful and enjoyable to use. I'm looking forward to seeing improvements in future [...] #### What's great

quality tech content (2)diverse content (1)engaged community (1)no restricted entrance policy (1)editorial support (1)engagement features (1)reward contests (1)startup companies feature (1)mobile apps (1)new publishing tools (1)
